pin.title: Enter PIN shown on the reMarkable
pin.asking: Asking the tablet to show the PIN…
pin.rateLimit: Just a moment, try again shortly.
pin.appeared: PIN should now appear on the tablet.
pin.tooMany: Too many attempts. Wait a minute, then try again.
sync.tokenLabel: GitHub token (saved in this browser; copied to tablet RAM when verified)
sync.hint: Sync from here or tablet Lobby → Sync tab.
sync.savedEnterRepo: Saved token. Enter repo to verify.
sync.tokenSaved: ✓ Token saved — tap Sync to sync documents.
sync.notConfigured: ✗ Sync not configured — save repo and token first.
sync.noToken: ✗ No token — enter token and tap Save first.
sync.syncedClash: ✓ Synced other documents; “%1” still needs review (sync clash).
sync.bannerNeedToken: ⚠ GitHub sync is on — add your token in Sync setup.
sync.statusOffline: Tablet offline — could not reach sync status
sync.statusTokenMissing: Token not on tablet — enter token and tap Save below
sync.clashBody: “%1” was also edited on GitHub. Your tablet version is now in “%2”; “%1” now holds the GitHub version. Review both, delete the one you don’t want.
sync.driftBody: “%1” was updated on disk while open on the tablet.
sync.driftOrKeep: or keep editing (unsaved buffer wins on save).
sync.reloadFailed: Could not reload — is the document still open on the tablet?
paste.title: Paste text at the cursor
paste.placeholder:
Paste your text here
(long-press → Paste on iOS)
paste.empty: Nothing to insert — paste some text first.
download.title: Download here?
download.pinTimeout: Timed out waiting for tablet PIN.
observe.title: Record keys for a bug report
observe.banner: Observing%1 — Stop when the bug shows.
lobby.confirmDelete: Delete on tablet: tap Delete or Cancel (Enter / Esc also work).
lobby.noKeyboard: Scan the QR on the tablet (or open the URL) to connect this phone as a keyboard.
generic.openDocFirst: open a document on the tablet first
sync.clearTokenConfirm: Remove GitHub token from this browser and the tablet?
sync.syncedSkippedOpen: ✓ Synced other documents; “%1” skipped while open.
